channel.title: ThreatRadar — critical & high
channel.description: Critical and high-severity entries only. Updated daily 06:30 JST.

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-31431 — Linux Kernel: Linux Kernel Incorrect Resource Transfer Between Spheres Vulnerability
item.description: Linux Kernel contains an incorrect resource transfer between spheres vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation. Required: "Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-05-15

item.title: [CRIT] Critical cPanel and WHM bug exploited as a zero-day, PoC now available
item.description: The critical CVE-2026-41940 authentication bypass vulnerability in cPanel, WHM, and WP Squared is being actively exploited in the wild and has been leveraged in attempts since late February. [...]

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-41940 — WebPros cPanel & WHM and WP2 (WordPress Squared): WebPros cPanel & WHM and WP2 (WordPress Squared) Missing Authentication for Critical Function Vulnerability
item.description: WebPros cPanel & WHM (WebHost Manager) and WP2 (WordPress Squared) contain an authentication bypass vulnerability in the login flow that allows unauthenticated remote attackers to gain unauthorized access to the control panel. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-05-03

item.title: [HIGH] CISA orders feds to patch Windows flaw exploited as zero-day
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has ordered federal agencies to secure their Windows systems against a vulnerability exploited in zero-day attacks. [...]

item.title: [HIGH] Claude Mythos Has Found 271 Zero-Days in Firefox
item.description: That’s a lot. No, it’s an extraordinary number: Since February, the Firefox team has been working around the clock using frontier AI models to find and fix latent security vulnerabilities in the browser. We wrote previously about our collaboration with Anthropic to scan Firefox with Opus 4.6, which led to fixes for 22 security-sensitive bugs in Firefox 148. As part of our continued collaboration with Anthropic, we had the opportunity to apply an early version of Claude Mythos Preview to Firefox. This week’s release of Firefox 150 includes fixes for 271 vulnerabilities identif...

item.title: [HIGH] CISA Adds Actively Exploited ConnectWise and Windows Flaws to KEV
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday added two security flaws impacting ConnectWise ScreenConnect and Microsoft Windows to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, based on evidence of active exploitation. The vulnerabilities are listed below - CVE-2024-1708 (CVSS score: 8.4) - A path traversal vulnerability in ConnectWise ScreenConnect

item.title: [HIGH] LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 SQL Injection Exploited within 36 Hours of Disclosure
item.description: In yet another instance of threat actors quickly jumping on the exploitation bandwagon, a newly disclosed critical security flaw in BerriAI's LiteLLM Python package has come under active exploitation in the wild within 36 hours of the bug becoming public knowledge. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-42208 (CVSS score: 9.3), is an SQL injection that could be exploited to modify the underlying

item.title: [HIGH] Microsoft Confirms Active Exploitation of Windows Shell CVE-2026-32202
item.description: Microsoft on Monday revised its advisory for a now-patched, high-severity security flaw impacting Windows Shell to acknowledge that it has been actively exploited in the wild. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-32202 (CVSS score: 4.3), a spoofing vulnerability that could allow an attacker to access sensitive information. It was addressed as part of its Patch Tuesday update for this

item.title: [HIGH] ZDI-26-305: (0Day) OpenAI Codex Sandbox Escape Vulnerability
item.description: This vulnerability allows remote attackers to bypass the sandbox on affected installations of OpenAI Codex. User interaction is required to exploit this vulnerability in that the target must use Codex to process a repository containing malicious JavaScript. The ZDI has assigned a CVSS rating of 8.6.

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2024-1708 — ConnectWise ScreenConnect: ConnectWise ScreenConnect Path Traversal Vulnerability
item.description: ConnectWise ScreenConnect contains a path traversal vulnerability which could allow an attacker to execute remote code or directly impact confidential data and critical systems. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-05-12

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-32202 — Microsoft Windows: Microsoft Windows Protection Mechanism Failure Vulnerability
item.description: Microsoft Windows Shell contains a protection mechanism failure vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-05-12

item.title: [HIGH] TeamPCP Supply Chain Campaign: Update 008 - 26-Day Pause Ends with Three Concurrent Compromises (Checkmarx KICS, Bitwarden CLI Cascade, xinference PyPI), CanisterSprawl npm Worm Identified, and Tier 1 Coverage Returns, (Mon, Apr 27th)
item.description: This update succeeds&&#x23;x26;&#x23;xc2;&&#x23;x26;&#x23;xa0;TeamPCP Supply Chain Campaign Update 007, published April 8, 2026, which left the campaign in credential-monetization mode following the Cisco source code theft via Trivy-linked credentials, Google GTIG&&#x23;x26;&#x23;39;s formal designation of the operators as UNC6780 (with their credential stealer named SANDCLOCK), and the lapsed CISA KEV remediation deadline for CVE-2026-33634 with no standalone federal advisory. The Sportradar publication deadline flagged in Update 007...

item.title: [HIGH] LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 Flaw Exploited Within 13 Hours of Disclosure
item.description: A high-severity security flaw in LMDeploy, an open-source toolkit for compressing, deploying, and serving large language models (LLMs), has come under active exploitation in the wild less than 13 hours after its public disclosure. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-33626 (CVSS score: 7.5), relates to a Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability that could be exploited to access

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2025-29635 — D-Link DIR-823X: D-Link DIR-823X Command Injection Vulnerability
item.description: D-Link DIR-823X contains a command injection vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to execute arbitrary commands on remote devices by sending a POST request to /goform/set_prohibiting via the corresponding function. The impacted product could be end-of-life (EoL) and/or end-of-service (EoS). Users should discontinue product utilization. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-05-08

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2024-7399 — Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server: Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server Path Traversal Vulnerability
item.description: Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server contains a path traversal vulnerability that could allow an attacker to write arbitrary files as system authority. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-05-08

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2024-57728 — SimpleHelp SimpleHelp: SimpleHelp Path Traversal Vulnerability
item.description: SimpleHelp contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows admin users to upload arbitrary files anywhere on the file system by uploading a crafted zip file (i.e. zip slip). This can be exploited to execute arbitrary code on the host in the context of the SimpleHelp server user. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-05-08

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2024-57726 — SimpleHelp SimpleHelp: SimpleHelp Missing Authorization Vulnerability
item.description: SimpleHelp contains a missing authorization vulnerability that could allow low-privileged technicians to create API keys with excessive permissions. These API keys can be used to escalate privileges to the server admin role. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-05-08

item.title: [HIGH] AI threats in the wild: The current state of prompt injections on the web
item.description: Posted by Thomas Brunner, Yu-Han Liu, Moni PandeAt Google, our Threat Intelligence teams are dedicated to staying ahead of real-world adversarial activity, proactively monitoring emerging threats before they can impact users. Right now, Indirect Prompt Injection (IPI) is a top priority for the security community, anticipating it as a primary attack vector for adversaries to target and compromise AI agents. But while the danger of IPI is widely discussed, are threat actors actually exploiting this vector today – and if so, how?To answer these questions and to uncover real-world abuse, we init...

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-39987 — Marimo Marimo: Marimo Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Marimo contains an pre-authorization remote code execution vulnerability, allowing an unauthenticated attacked to shell access and execute arbitrary system commands. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-05-07

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-33825 — Microsoft Defender: Microsoft Defender Insufficient Granularity of Access Control Vulnerability
item.description: Microsoft Defender contains an insufficient granularity of access control vulnerability that could allow an authorized attacker to escalate privileges locally. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-05-06

item.title: [HIGH] ZDI-26-245: (0Day) aws-mcp-server AWS CLI Command Injection Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of aws-mcp-server. Authentication is not required to exploit this vulnerability. The ZDI has assigned a CVSS rating of 9.8. The following CVEs are assigned: CVE-2026-5059.

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-20122 — Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manger: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Incorrect Use of Privileged APIs Vulnerability
item.description: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains an incorrect use of privileged APIs vulnerability due to improper file handling on the API interface of an affected system. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by uploading a malicious file on the local file system. A successful exploit could allow the attacker to overwrite arbitrary files on the affected system and gain vmanage user privileges. Required: Please adhere to CISA’s guidelines to assess exposure and mitigate risks associated with Cisco SD-WAN devices as outlines in CISA’s Emergency Directive 26-03 (URL listed below in Notes) and CISA’s “Hunt & Hardening Guidance for Cisco SD-WAN Devices (URL listed below in Notes). Adhere to the applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are not available. Due: 2026-04-23

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-20133 — Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor Vulnerability
item.description: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains an exposure of sensitive information to an unauthorized actor vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to view sensitive information on affected systems. Required: Please adhere to CISA’s guidelines to assess exposure and mitigate risks associated with Cisco SD-WAN devices as outlines in CISA’s Emergency Directive 26-03 (URL listed below in Notes) and CISA’s “Hunt & Hardening Guidance for Cisco SD-WAN Devices (URL listed below in Notes). Adhere to the applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are not available. Due: 2026-04-23

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2025-2749 — Kentico Kentico Xperience: Kentico Xperience Path Traversal Vulnerability
item.description: Kentico Xperience contains a path traversal vulnerability that could allow an authenticated user's Staging Sync Server to upload arbitrary data to path relative locations. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-05-04

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2023-27351 — PaperCut NG/MF: PaperCut NG/MF Improper Authentication Vulnerability
item.description: PaperCut NG/MF contains an improper authentication vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to bypass authentication on affected installations via the SecurityRequestFilter class. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-05-04

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2025-48700 — Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS): Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) Cross-site Scripting Vulnerability
item.description: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability that could allow attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript within the user's session, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive information. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-23

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-20128 — Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Storing Passwords in a Recoverable Format Vulnerability
item.description: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains a storing passwords in a recoverable format vulnerability that allows an authenticated, local attacker to gain DCA user privileges by accessing a credential file for the DCA user on the filesystem as a low-privileged user. Required: Please adhere to CISA’s guidelines to assess exposure and mitigate risks associated with Cisco SD-WAN devices as outlines in CISA’s Emergency Directive 26-03 (URL listed below in Notes) and CISA’s “Hunt & Hardening Guidance for Cisco SD-WAN Devices (URL listed below in Notes). Adhere to the applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are not available. Due: 2026-04-23

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2025-32975 — Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA): Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA) Improper Authentication Vulnerability
item.description: Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA) contains an improper authentication vulnerability that could allow attackers to impersonate legitimate users without valid credentials. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-05-04

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2024-27199 — JetBrains TeamCity: JetBrains TeamCity Relative Path Traversal Vulnerability
item.description: JetBrains TeamCity contains a relative path traversal vulnerability that could allow limited admin actions to be performed. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-05-04

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-34197 — Apache ActiveMQ: Apache ActiveMQ Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
item.description: Apache ActiveMQ contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows for code injection. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-30

item.title: [HIGH] ZDI-26-259: (0Day) Docker Desktop cli-plugins Incorrect Permission Assignment Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
item.description: This vulnerability allows local attackers to escalate privileges on affected installations of Docker Desktop for Windows. An attacker must first obtain the ability to escape the container and execute low-privileged code within the Docker Hyper-V VM in order to exploit this vulnerability. The ZDI has assigned a CVSS rating of 7.8.

item.title: [HIGH] ZDI-26-258: (0Day) Docker Desktop extension-manager Exposed Dangerous Function Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
item.description: This vulnerability allows local attackers to escalate privileges on affected installations of Docker Desktop for Windows. An attacker must first obtain the ability to execute high-privileged code within the container in order to exploit this vulnerability. The ZDI has assigned a CVSS rating of 8.2.

item.title: [HIGH] Patch Tuesday - April 2026
item.description: Microsoft is publishing 167 vulnerabilities on April 2026 Patch Tuesday. Microsoft is aware of exploitation in the wild for one of today’s vulnerabilities, and public disclosure for one other. Microsoft evaluates 19 of the vulnerabilities published today as more likely to see future exploitation. So far this month, Microsoft has provided patches to address 80 browser vulnerabilities, which are not included in the Patch Tuesday count above.Increasing volumes of vulnerabilitiesRegular Patch Tuesday watchers will know that these vulnerability totals are significantly higher than usual, especial...

item.title: [CRIT] Patch Tuesday, April 2026 Edition
item.description: Microsoft today pushed software updates to fix a staggering 167 security vulnerabilities in its Windows operating systems and related software, including a SharePoint Server zero-day and a publicly disclosed weakness in Windows Defender dubbed "BlueHammer." Separately, Google Chrome fixed its fourth zero-day of 2026, and an emergency update for Adobe Reader nixes an actively exploited flaw that can lead to remote code execution.

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2009-0238 — Microsoft Office: Microsoft Office Remote Code Execution
item.description: Microsoft Office Excel contains a remote code execution vulnerability that could allow an attacker to take complete control of an affected system if a user opens a specially crafted Excel file that includes a malformed object. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-28

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-32201 — Microsoft SharePoint Server: Microsoft SharePoint Server Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
item.description: Microsoft SharePoint Server contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-28

item.title: [HIGH] [CVSS 9.8 CRITICAL] CVE-2026-22563 — A series of Improper Input Validation vulnerabilities could allow a Command Inje…
item.description:
A series of Improper Input Validation vulnerabilities could allow a Command Injection by a malicious actor with access to the UniFi Play network.
Affected Products: UniFi Play PowerAmp (Version 1.0.35 and earlier) UniFi Play Audio Port (Version 1.0.24 and earlier)
Mitigation: Update UniFi Play PowerAmp to Version 1.0.38 or later Update UniFi Play Audio Port to Version 1.1.9 or later

item.title: [HIGH] [CVSS 9.8 CRITICAL] CVE-2026-22562 — A malicious actor with access to the UniFi Play network could exploit a Path Tra…
item.description:
A malicious actor with access to the UniFi Play network could exploit a Path Traversal vulnerability found in the device firmware to write files on the system that could be used for a remote code execution (RCE).
Affected Products: UniFi Play PowerAmp (Version 1.0.35 and earlier) UniFi Play Audio Port (Version 1.0.24 and earlier) Mitigation: Update UniFi Play PowerAmp to Version 1.0.38 or later Update UniFi Play Audio Port to Version 1.1.9 or later

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2012-1854 — Microsoft Visual Basic for Applications (VBA): Microsoft Visual Basic for Applications Insecure Library Loading Vulnerability
item.description: Microsoft Visual Basic for Applications (VBA) contains an insecure library loading vulnerability that could allow for remote code execution. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-27

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2025-60710 — Microsoft Windows: Microsoft Windows Link Following Vulnerability
item.description: Microsoft Windows contains a link following vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-27

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2023-21529 — Microsoft Exchange Server: Microsoft Exchange Server Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
item.description: Microsoft Exchange Server contains a deserialization of untrusted data that allows an authenticated attacker to achieve remote code execution. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-27

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2023-36424 — Microsoft Windows: Microsoft Windows Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability
item.description: Microsoft Windows Common Log File System Driver contains an out-of-bounds read vulnerability that could allow a threat actor for privileges escalation Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-27

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2020-9715 — Adobe Acrobat: Adobe Acrobat Use-After-Free Vulnerability
item.description: Adobe Acrobat contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows for code execution Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-27

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-21643 — Fortinet FortiClient EMS: Fortinet FortiClient EMS SQL Injection Vulnerability
item.description: Fortinet FortiClient EMS contains a SQL injection vulnerability that may allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute unauthorized code or commands via specifically crafted HTTP requests. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-16

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-34621 — Adobe Acrobat and Reader: Adobe Acrobat and Reader Prototype Pollution Vulnerability
item.description: Adobe Acrobat and Reader contain a prototype pollution vulnerability that allows for arbitrary code execution. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-27

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-1340 — Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM): Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) Code Injection Vulnerability
item.description: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) contains a code injection vulnerability that could allow attackers to achieve unauthenticated remote code execution. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-11

item.title: [HIGH] [CVSS 10.0 CRITICAL] CVE-2026-34444 — Lupa integrates the runtimes of Lua or LuaJIT2 into CPython. In 2.6 and earlier,…
item.description: Lupa integrates the runtimes of Lua or LuaJIT2 into CPython. In 2.6 and earlier, attribute_filter is not consistently applied when attributes are accessed through built-in functions like getattr and setattr. This allows an attacker to bypass the intended restrictions and eventually achieve arbitrary code execution.

item.title: [HIGH] ZDI-26-257: (0Day) Labcenter Electronics Proteus PDSPRJ File Parsing Out-Of-Bounds Write Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of Labcenter Electronics Proteus. User interaction is required to exploit this vulnerability in that the target must visit a malicious page or open a malicious file. The ZDI has assigned a CVSS rating of 7.8. The following CVEs are assigned: CVE-2026-5495.

item.title: [HIGH] ZDI-26-256: (0Day) Labcenter Electronics Proteus PDSPRJ File Parsing Out-Of-Bounds Write Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of Labcenter Electronics Proteus. User interaction is required to exploit this vulnerability in that the target must visit a malicious page or open a malicious file. The ZDI has assigned a CVSS rating of 7.8. The following CVEs are assigned: CVE-2026-5494.

item.title: [HIGH] ZDI-26-255: (0Day) Labcenter Electronics Proteus PDSPRJ File Parsing Out-Of-Bounds Write Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of Labcenter Electronics Proteus. User interaction is required to exploit this vulnerability in that the target must visit a malicious page or open a malicious file. The ZDI has assigned a CVSS rating of 7.8. The following CVEs are assigned: CVE-2026-5493.

item.title: [HIGH] ZDI-26-254: (0Day) Labcenter Electronics Proteus PDSPRJ File Parsing Type Confusion Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of Labcenter Electronics Proteus. User interaction is required to exploit this vulnerability in that the target must visit a malicious page or open a malicious file. The ZDI has assigned a CVSS rating of 7.8. The following CVEs are assigned: CVE-2026-5496.

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-35616 — Fortinet FortiClient EMS: Fortinet FortiClient EMS Improper Access Control Vulnerability
item.description: Fortinet FortiClient EMS contains an improper access control vulnerability that may allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute unauthorized code or commands via crafted requests. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-09

item.title: [CRIT] Simplifying MBA obfuscation with CoBRA
item.description: Mixed Boolean-Arithmetic (MBA) obfuscation disguises simple operations like x + y behind tangles of arithmetic and bitwise operators. Malware authors and software protectors rely on it because no standard simplification technique covers both domains simultaneously; algebraic simplifiers don’t understand bitwise logic, and Boolean minimizers can’t handle arithmetic. We’re releasing CoBRA, an open-source tool that simplifies the full range of MBA expressions used in the wild. Point it at an obfuscated expression and it recovers a simplified equivalent: $ cobra-cli --mba "(x&y)+(x|y)" x...

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-3502 — TrueConf Client: TrueConf Client Download of Code Without Integrity Check Vulnerability
item.description: TrueConf Client contains a download of code without integrity check vulnerability. An attacker who is able to influence the update delivery path can substitute a tampered update payload. If the payload is executed or installed by the updater, this may result in arbitrary code execution in the context of the updating process or user. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-16

item.title: [HIGH] [CVSS 9.8 CRITICAL] CVE-2026-34159 — llama.cpp is an inference of several LLM models in C/C++. Prior to version b8492…
item.description: llama.cpp is an inference of several LLM models in C/C++. Prior to version b8492, the RPC backend's deserialize_tensor() skips all bounds validation when a tensor's buffer field is 0. An unauthenticated attacker can read and write arbitrary process memory via crafted GRAPH_COMPUTE messages. Combined with pointer leaks from ALLOC_BUFFER/BUFFER_GET_BASE, this gives full ASLR bypass and remote code execution. No authentication required, just TCP access to the RPC server port. This issue has been patched in version b8492.

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-5281 — Google Dawn: Google Dawn Use-After-Free Vulnerability
item.description: Google Dawn contains an use-after-free vulnerability that could allow a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple Chromium-based products including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-15

item.title: [HIGH] ZDI-26-246: (0Day) aws-mcp-server Command Injection Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of aws-mcp-server. Authentication is not required to exploit this vulnerability. The ZDI has assigned a CVSS rating of 9.8. The following CVEs are assigned: CVE-2026-5058.

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-3055 — Citrix NetScaler: Citrix NetScaler Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability
item.description: Citrix NetScaler ADC (formerly Citrix ADC), NetScaler Gateway (formerly Citrix Gateway) and NetScaler ADC FIPS and NDcPP contain an out-of-bounds reads vulnerability when configured as a SAML IDP leading to memory overread. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-02

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2025-53521 — F5 BIG-IP: F5 BIG-IP Stack-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
item.description: F5 BIG-IP APM contains a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability that could allow a threat actor to achieve remote code execution. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-03-30

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-33634 — Aquasecurity Trivy: Aquasecurity Trivy Embedded Malicious Code Vulnerability
item.description: Aquasecurity Trivy contains an embedded malicious code vulnerability that could allow an attacker to gain access to everything in the CI/CD environment, including all tokens, SSH keys, cloud credentials, database passwords, and any sensitive configuration in memory. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-09

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-33017 — Langflow Langflow: Langflow Code Injection Vulnerability
item.description: Langflow contains a code injection vulnerability that could allow building public flows without requiring authentication. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-08

item.title: [HIGH] ZDI-26-226: (0Day) Microsoft Azure MCP AzureCliService Command Injection Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of Microsoft Azure. Authentication is not required to exploit this vulnerability. The ZDI has assigned a CVSS rating of 9.8.

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2025-32432 — Craft CMS Craft CMS: Craft CMS Code Injection Vulnerability
item.description: Craft CMS contains a code injection vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-03

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2025-54068 — Laravel Livewire: Laravel Livewire Code Injection Vulnerability
item.description: Laravel Livewire contain a code injection vulnerability that could allow unauthenticated attackers to achieve remote command execution in specific scenarios. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-03

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2025-43510 — Apple Multiple Products: Apple Multiple Products Improper Locking Vulnerability
item.description: Apple watchOS, iOS, iPadOS, macOS, visionOS, and tvOS contain an improper locking vulnerability that could allow a malicious application to cause unexpected changes in memory shared between processes. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-03

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2025-43520 — Apple Multiple Products: Apple Multiple Products Classic Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
item.description: Apple watchOS, iOS, iPadOS, macOS, visionOS, and tvOS contain a classic buffer overflow vulnerability which could allow a malicious application to cause unexpected system termination or write kernel memory. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-03

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2025-31277 — Apple Multiple Products: Apple Multiple Products Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
item.description: Apple Safari, iOS, watchOS, visionOS, iPadOS, macOS, and tvOS contain a buffer overflow vulnerability that could allow the processing of maliciously crafted web content which may lead to memory corruption. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-03

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-20131 — Cisco Secure Firewall Management Center (FMC): Cisco Secure Firewall Management Center (FMC) Software and Cisco Security Cloud Control (SCC) Firewall Management Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
item.description: Cisco Secure Firewall Management Center (FMC) Software and Cisco Security Cloud Control (SCC) Firewall Management contain a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in the web-based management interface that could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to execute arbitrary Java code as root on an affected device. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-03-22

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2025-66376 — Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS): Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) Cross-Site Scripting Vulnerability
item.description: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Classic UI where attackers could abuse Cascading Style Sheets (CSS) @import directives in email HTML. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-04-01

item.title: [CRIT] [KEV] CVE-2026-20963 — Microsoft SharePoint: Microsoft SharePoint Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
item.description: Microsoft SharePoint contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network. Required: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Due: 2026-03-21
